settings.heading: Where is it made?
settings.content: Using Nano-Crystalline technology, Bleame™ Crystal Hair Eraser allows the hair to clump and break from the surface when rubbed gently on the skin. This process also helps exfoliate, revealing baby smooth skin after use 💜

settings.heading: Instructions
settings.content:
Prep Your Skin

Exfoliate your skin no less than 24 hours before use. If you have sensitive skin, exfoliate no less than 48 hours before use.

Patch Test for Sensitivity

Conduct a patch test on a small area of each leg: one with damp skin and the other with dry skin. Test with moisture barriers like hypoallergenic moisturizer or cream. Allow it to fully absorb before using your Eraser. For added comfort, test with a protective layer of shaving gel or cream.

Get to action

After a successful patch test, treat your desired areas using the method and technique that felt most comfortable during testing. Start with gentle, circular motions and light pressure. Adjust your technique as needed, avoiding excessive pressure that may cause irritation. Take breaks between passes and use shorter strokes to minimize friction and heat.

Aftercare for Soothing Relief

Rinse the treated area with cool water and gently pat it dry, avoiding rubbing. Apply a fragrance-free, hypoallergenic moisturizer. For an extra relief, use a cold compress for 10-15 minutes.

Caring for Your Eraser

After each use, rinse your Crystal Hair Eraser under running water to remove hair and exfoliated skin. Store the eraser in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and humidity.
Important Note: If you experience any discomfort or irritation during or after use, discontinue use immediately. Visit our Help Center for more information.

settings.heading: What Does It Do?
settings.content:
ArkDrive helps your body perform at its best—naturally. It increases your energy levels, enhances stamina, and supports healthy testosterone production. Whether you're working out, staying active, or just trying to power through the day, ArkDrive gives you the physical and mental boost you need to stay sharp, strong, and focused.

It also aids in quicker recovery, better blood flow, and overall vitality, making it an all-in-one solution for men who want to feel more alive, more driven, and more capable—without relying on synthetic boosters.

settings.heading: Who Is ArkDrive Natural Performance Booster For?
settings.content:
ArkDrive Natural Performance Booster is likely a supplement designed to enhance physical performance, stamina, and energy levels using natural ingredients. These types of products are often used by:


Athletes or fitness enthusiasts looking to boost endurance and recovery

Men experiencing low energy or performance issues, especially related to libido or vitality

Anyone needing a clean, natural energy lift without relying on synthetic stimulants

settings.heading: How It Works?
settings.content:
ArkDrive uses a science-backed blend of natural ingredients that work synergistically to boost your body’s performance from the inside out. Once taken, the formula begins by increasing blood circulation and oxygen flow, delivering vital nutrients to your muscles and brain. It helps balance testosterone levels, which play a key role in strength, stamina, and overall vitality.

Adaptogenic herbs and energy-enhancing compounds then kick in to reduce fatigue, improve focus, and fuel endurance—without the crash of synthetic stimulants. Over time, consistent use supports better workout performance, mental clarity, and long-term energy balance.

settings.heading: Return & Refund Policy
settings.content:
1.1 Return Due To Change Of Mind

We will happily accept returns due to change of mind as long as a request to return is received by us within 72 hours of receipt of item. 

Once approved, refunds will be processed to their original payment method. We will notify you once this has been completed through email.

We will refund the value of the goods returned but will NOT refund the value of any shipping paid.

1.2 Cancellations

If you change your mind before a tracking numbers has been generated, we are able to accept cancellations at any time before the order has been dispatched. If an order has already been dispatched, please refer to our refund policy.

settings.faq-ques: How often should I use it ?
settings.faq-content: We recommend taking 0.5ml of ARK Drops daily. You can split the dose into two if you prefer to use it more frequently throughout the day.

settings.faq-ques: When should I use Ark drops ?
settings.faq-content: ARK Drops can be used for physical performance to increase strength, endurance, and muscle recovery. Users have reported that it helps them with stress relief, as it helps improve airflow and breathing. This can help calm the nervous system and promote better sleep.

settings.faq-ques: Can I use Ark drops as a asthmatic
settings.faq-content: ARK Drops are crafted to support a refreshing and mindful breathing experience, making them a valuable addition to wellness routines focused on relaxation and vitality. MAny users have shared that ARK Drops enhance their breathing, contributing to a sense of ease and focus. While we cannot make specific medical claims, we value the feedback from customers who incorporate ARK Drops into their daily lives. If you have a health condition or are taking medication, we encourage you to consult a healthcare professional to determine if ARK Drops align with your individual needs and lifestyle

settings.faq-ques: How long does it take to feel the effects?
settings.faq-content: ARK Drops provide an instant kick that leaves you feeling more motivated and energized. The long-term benefits typically occur after using ARK Drops for 10 days.
